name: EPUB Read
description: Use Feishu CLI to download EPUB files from Lark Drive, parse them safely, and publish overview or extraction results to Lark docs.
author: Lucas
positioning: Treat EPUB reading as a Feishu CLI-driven, task-routed workflow instead of loading a whole book into context at once.
core_value: Help users pull EPUB files from Feishu, read them safely in explicit modes, and publish the resulting notes back to Lark docs.
differentiation: Uses Feishu CLI as the intake and publishing layer
Splits EPUB work into six explicit task modes
Prefers chunked reading over full-book context stuffing
Maintains reading state for continue, previous, next, and jump flows
Supports overview, extraction, complex-content inspection, and batch planning
Produces reusable artifacts that can be published into Lark docs
